title: Florida woman accused of crashing into multiple cars, throwing fake snake to evade traffic stop

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Florida woman accused of crashing into multiple cars, throwing fake snake to evade traffic stop
Dawn LaShawn Laprade, 54, faces multiple charges, with additional charges possible, including four counts of aggravated assault on a police officer and fleeing and eluding.
Name: Dawn LaShawn Laprade, 54
Date: May 18, 2022
Location: Martin County, FL
Agency: Martin County Sheriff's Office
Charges: Four counts aggravated assault on officer, fleeing and eluding, plus additional charges

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

David Rennich

title: Chelsea Alston, 32, airport rode away on her motorized luggage

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

A woman, barred from boarding her flight because she was intoxicated, cussed out a police officer and [then rode away on her motorized luggage](https://www.clickorlando.com/news/local/2022/02/15/full-video-drunken-woman-on-motorized-suitcase-leads-police-chase-through-orlando-airport-officials-say/). An officer pursued her through the airport—on a bicycle. Chelsea Alston, 32, was later accused of battering the police officer and causing more than $1,000 in damage to his patrol car, court records allege. If convicted, she faces up to five years in prison for each offense.
February 15, 2022
Location: Orlando International Airport, Orlando FL
Agency: Orlando Police Department or Aviation Authority Police

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

David Rennich

title: Bodycam Footage - Lawnmower Warrant Arrest - July 11, 2022 - Crestview FL

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

All body-worn camera footage from an incident occurring on July 11, 2022 in Crestview, Florida, involving Okaloosa County Sheriff's deputies responding to serve a warrant on a male subject who attempted to flee on a lawnmower and was subsequently subdued with a Taser.
I would prefer the records fulfilled electronically via email or download link. In the event that fees are required, please notify me of the estimated cost before fulfilling the request.
Thank you for your assistance.
David Rennich

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

David Rennich
